patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -4,9 +4,9 @@
 #include <stdint.h>
 
 #define ADC_ERR_NONE       0
-#define ADC_ERR_BUSY      -1
-#define ADC_ERR_OVERFLOW  -2
-#define ADC_ERR_TIMEOUT   -3
+#define ADC_ERR_BUSY      -2
+#define ADC_ERR_OVERFLOW  -3
+#define ADC_ERR_TIMEOUT   -4
 
 int adc_sample(uint8_t channel, uint16_t *out);
 int adc_start_continuous(uint8_t channel, uint16_t interval_ms);
description: All non-zero ADC error code macros were renumbered, breaking callers that compare return values against the old numeric constants.
